description: Claude-generated training paraphrases for fraud detection. 100 templates spanning 5 scam categories (20 each) with diverse surface wording, persuasion intents, and impersonation targets. Written to be disjoint from chakravyuh-bench-v0 test set.
source: generated by Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context), hand-curated for Indian UPI fraud patterns

templates.opener: Sir, speaking from Bank of Baroda head office security team. A UPI debit request of Rs 97,500 is sitting in your account queue from an unknown merchant.
templates.escalation: To cancel this debit I need the six-digit verification number just sent to your registered number. Time-out in 75 seconds.

templates.opener: Federal Bank fraud desk alert — your a/c is being accessed by a device fingerprinted in Nepal right now.
templates.escalation: Dictate the OTP we have auto-dispatched within 2 minutes or we cannot reverse the pending Rs 1.75L NEFT.

templates.opener: PMJDY Pension Credit: Rs 3,000 senior citizen monthly pension under PM Jan Dhan scheme credited pending OTP verification.
templates.escalation: Share the confirmation code from SMS to release credit. Window closes 3 PM — next disbursement 30 days later.

templates.opener: PhonePe Super Spin winner! Your number got Rs 15,000 cashback in today's lucky draw.
templates.escalation: Claim in next 4 minutes by sharing verification OTP. Unclaimed prizes roll over to next winner.

templates.opener: Amazon Prime renewal team: Your annual membership charge of Rs 1,499 is processing on the wrong card.
templates.escalation: Redirect the charge to correct card by reading out the authorization OTP we sent — this is the only way.

templates.opener: EPFO cybersecurity cell: Your UAN account password has been reset by an unknown device in Jharkhand.
templates.escalation: We need confirmation OTP from you to reverse the password reset before PF balance gets transferred out. 4 minutes only.

templates.opener: Madam, Karur Vysya Bank net banking team. Third failed login attempt on your account from an Android device.
templates.escalation: Lock the attacker out by sharing the six-digit confirmation SMS we just dispatched. Rs 2.4L is at risk.

templates.opener: Jio Fiber technical team: Your Wi-Fi modem MAC address clone detected on our network.
templates.escalation: Bind device by sharing security OTP sent to your Jio-linked mobile. Else data tariff resets to Rs 5/MB.

templates.opener: Flipkart Super-Sale Insider: You're shortlisted for a Rs 50,000 shopping voucher — first 200 users only.
templates.escalation: Redeem by verifying identity — read the 6-digit code SMS'd just now. Voucher credited instantly.

templates.opener: Traffic Police e-Challan Unit: Your vehicle is on our BOLO list — 17 outstanding challans totaling Rs 34,500.
templates.escalation: Avoid vehicle impoundment tomorrow morning by verifying with OTP + settling half the fine immediately.

templates.opener: CRED Rewards: You've accumulated Rs 8,400 in unredeemed cashback. Expiring tonight at midnight.
templates.escalation: Enable instant credit by sharing verification OTP — only way to prevent forfeiture.

templates.opener: Hello? This is your neighbor Mrs Patel — your father fainted outside his house and I brought him to my place.
templates.escalation: He needs ambulance NOW. I'm paying online but my UPI needs your OTP to approve a family transfer — please quickly beta.

templates.opener: DBS Digibank security: Your mobile number is marked for SIM-swap by an unauthorized party attempting account takeover.
templates.escalation: Lock your SIM binding by confirming the validation code you just received via SMS within 90 seconds.

templates.opener: IRCTC Rail Madad: Tatkal booking attempt on your account from Jaipur has failed payment.
templates.escalation: Retry within 3 minutes using your OTP confirmation or the seat gets released to waitlist.

templates.opener: IndusInd Bank compliance: Your account is flagged under SUSPICIOUS-FOREIGN-INWARD per RBI/FIU directive.
templates.escalation: Unblock by dictating OTP we've sent. Non-response triggers 48-hour freeze + FIU hearing notice.

templates.opener: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi: 17th installment of Rs 4,000 approved for your registered Aadhaar.
templates.escalation: Confirm bank account binding via OTP — first 5,000 farmers today get Rs 1,000 bonus too.

templates.opener: AU Small Finance Bank: Your Zero-Balance account was just upgraded to Priority Savings by our system, error.
templates.escalation: To revert we need OTP verification. Delay means annual fee Rs 2,499 auto-deducts tomorrow.

templates.opener: SBI retail asset ops: Your home loan EMI auto-debit has bounced — second bounce this quarter.
templates.escalation: CIBIL hit prevented only if you validate via OTP immediately to reschedule debit. Rs 3.2L monthly at stake.

templates.opener: Arre yaar, college ke Rohan hoon. Tu 2019 batch CSE mein tha na? Mera phone kho gaya, Priya ke number se msg kar raha hoon.
templates.escalation: Reunion 25th ko hai Bangalore mein — main organize kar raha hoon. Group pe add karne ke liye aaya OTP bata de bas.
